hypothesis: Invocation 35 should continue the smallest unfinished Task 6 gate: first executable validation of the hardened Q0.24 top-k comparator cutout. If command startup recovered, Verilator would compile and run the checked-in RTL/testbench against the expected-state oracle; because Verilator still fails before compilation with the sandbox loopback error, no simulator, Python replay, synthesis, bitstream, or hardware evidence is promoted.

commands.cmd: sed reads of h2-int8-l2-selftest-board-comparison.json, h2-v4k-scale-up-summary.json, and h2-vocab-memory-surface-score.json

commands.failure: bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted

commands.cmd: sed reads of Q0.24 expected-state artifact, RTL, testbench, invocation34 blocked artifact, and current handoff

commands.failure: bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted

metrics.hardware_block_reason: no board access in this run
metrics.rtl_tie_break: lower token id wins exact score ties
metrics.rtl_reserved_sidecar_policy: upper 8 sidecar bits set sticky error and do not update top1 state

decision.rationale: The Q0.24 comparator remains the right tiny gate, but the only executable validation attempted in this invocation failed before compilation. Static readback did not reveal a mismatch with the prepared oracle, but that is not simulator evidence.
decision.next_gate: Recover command startup, then run: verilator --binary --timing -Wall rtl/task6/task6_q024_topk_score_compare.sv rtl/task6/task6_q024_topk_score_compare_tb.sv && ./obj_dir/Vtask6_q024_topk_score_compare_tb. If it passes, emit h2-q024-topk-comparator-cutout-result.json; if it fails, fix only the tiny comparator/testbench.

next_gate: First simulator validation of the hardened Q0.24 comparator cutout; no DDR3 integration, full TinyStories synthesis, OpenFPGALoader, JTAG, FTDI, or MPSSE commands.
